title: If You Knew Susie
writer: Warren Wilson, Oscar Brodney, Bud Pearson
actors: Eddie Cantor, Joan Davis, Allyn Joslyn
plot: In the small town of Brookford, everybody can trace their ancestors back to the Revolutionary War, except Sam and Susie Parker. One day, however, they find a letter written by George Washington that mentions the bravery of a Revol...
